introSection: Bat Glider is a steel indoor kiddie suspended single rail roller coaster located at Trans Studio Action Zone in East Jakarta, Jakarta, Indonesia. It operated from 2001 to 2015 at Hamanako Pal Pal in Japan as Bat Glider (Japanese: パレオフライヤー).

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and blue supports. The ride used to have yellow track in Hamanako Pal Pal.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The wheel assembly of the car is covered by a yellow bat. It also featured these bats when it opened at Hamanako Pal Pal, albeit in a different colour. It would recieve new charakters later down the line, with the bats seemingly being put in storage, since they returned when the ride was relocated.

sections.content:
* Bat Glider on the park's website
 * Batflyer on Hamanako Pal Pal's website

fullText:
Bat Glider is a steel indoor kiddie suspended single rail roller coaster located at Trans Studio Action Zone in East Jakarta, Jakarta, Indonesia. It operated from 2001 to 2015 at Hamanako Pal Pal in Japan as Bat Glider (Japanese: パレオフライヤー).



Red track and blue supports. The ride used to have yellow track in Hamanako Pal Pal.

The wheel assembly of the car is covered by a yellow bat. It also featured these bats when it opened at Hamanako Pal Pal, albeit in a different colour. It would recieve new charakters later down the line, with the bats seemingly being put in storage, since they returned when the ride was relocated.


 * Bat Glider on the park's website
 * Batflyer on Hamanako Pal Pal's website
